ultimate_goal: Build a movement connecting stagehands with training, jobs, and community through an integrated ecosystem of labor management, skill development, and opportunity discovery.
phase_description: Establish the core labor sourcing and training infrastructure to create a foundation for long-term community building.

this_week_focus.note: Focus on Deadhang business fundamentals while advancing Crew Blueprint and Production Atlas planning

branches.name: Deadhang Labor LLC
branches.role: Solo contractor turning into labor staffing agency
branches.ultimate_goal: Establish Deadhang as a reliable labor sourcing and staffing entity that can contract large gigs and deploy teams of stagehands.
branches.current_state: Currently operating as solo Member-Managed LLC. Successfully generating income through direct contracting. Missing: business structure validation, team deployment capability, systematic gig tracking.
branches.critical_blocker: Business affairs and operating structure need review before scaling to team deployment

timeline.description: Validate business structure, establish team deployment framework, build initial contractor network

blockers: Deadhang admin items remain open - need business structure review
Need team deployment and contractor management systems
Invoice tracking and payment systems incomplete

work_items.task: Complete business structure audit and compliance review
work_items.why: Ensure LLC is properly structured before scaling team operations
Establish baseline for future automation of gig history and contractor assignment

work_items.task: Identify and recruit initial contractor network
work_items.why: Build team capacity for multi-person gig contracts
Enable coordination of team deployments and gig assignments

branches.name: The Crew Blueprint
branches.role: Skill development and industry knowledge resource
branches.ultimate_goal: Provide stagehands with a visual, workflow-based learning system that teaches skills, context, and industry integration without formal certification.
branches.current_state: In content-first pause. No LMS platform yet. Brand system defined. Core concept of discipline/pathway mapping established. Platform instability remains a blocker for content expansion.
branches.critical_blocker: Platform shell/LMS instability blocks content expansion and deployment

timeline.description: Complete resource library organization by discipline/pathway, launch foundational curriculum

blockers: Platform instability must be resolved before scaling content
Authority and safety trust model needs definition
Repository structure needs granular discipline/pathway mapping
LMS remains paused pending platform stabilization

work_items.task: Define safety and content authority model
work_items.why: Establish trust framework before scaling training content deployment
Organize content logically for learner navigation across roles and skill levels
Remove technical blockers to content expansion
Build initial content library for core stagehand skills

branches.name: Production Atlas
branches.role: Job sourcing and opportunity discovery platform
branches.ultimate_goal: Create a visual, searchable job discovery platform that connects contractors and workers to employment opportunities and links them directly to hiring companies.
branches.current_state: Frontier pillar with 34 active items and 19 blockers. Research infrastructure established. Public/private data boundary needs definition. Source URL cleanup in progress. Verification standards incomplete.
branches.critical_blocker: Public research has verification gaps - need verification standards and human review process

timeline.description: Implement data verification system, establish company relationships, launch job discovery MVP

blockers: Public-safe research boundary verification gaps
Source URL cleanup and inventory incomplete
Cannot rely on public sources alone for crew logistics data
Vendor staffing relationships remain unverified
Festival feed needs source-quality gates

work_items.task: Define public/private research boundary and verification standards
work_items.why: Establish quality gates before scaling data collection and publication

work_items.task: Complete 2026 source URL inventory and cleanup
work_items.why: Ensure data sources are current, verified, and properly documented
Enable collaborative fact-checking of opportunity and vendor data
Create direct data pipelines with employers and vendors for job postings

work_items.task: Design and build job discovery MVP interface
work_items.why: Create searchable, visual platform for contractors to find opportunities

branches.name: Contractor Tools
branches.role: Infrastructure for payments, scheduling, and team coordination
branches.ultimate_goal: Provide contractors with integrated tools for invoicing, payment tracking, calendar management, and team communication.
branches.current_state: Backend infrastructure planned. Invoice system architecture defined. Calendar automation in progress. Communication tools needed. Laravel backend approved but requirements need validation.
branches.critical_blocker: Invoice and calendar systems need validation against actual MVP requirements

timeline.description: Build reliable invoicing and calendar systems, establish payment workflows

blockers: Backend architecture risk of overbuilding before requirements validation
Invoice parser/PDF architecture must remain stable
Calendar automation depends on reliable authorization renewal
Invoice generator enterprise plan is overbuilt for current MVP

work_items.task: Validate backend requirements against MVP scope
work_items.why: Prevent overbuilding infrastructure before knowing actual needs

work_items.task: Scope down invoice generator to MVP requirements
work_items.why: Focus on core functionality before enterprise features
Ensure reliable calendar synchronization for scheduling
Enable contractors to monitor and manage payments

branches.name: Skills & Certifications
branches.role: Formal credential and advanced skill development
branches.ultimate_goal: Develop formal training pathways and certifications for specialized stagehand skills (lighting, sound, rigging, etc.).
branches.current_state: Framework defined. Integrated with Crew Blueprint. Deferred pending core platform establishment. Discipline pathways identified.
branches.critical_blocker: Crew Blueprint platform must be stable before scaling formal training systems

timeline.description: Map skill certifications to market opportunities, develop assessment criteria

blockers: Dependent on Crew Blueprint platform stabilization and LMS deployment

work_items.task: Map specialized skill certifications to market demand
work_items.why: Ensure training pathways align with actual job market needs
Create standards for skill validation and credential issuance

branches.name: Personal Operations / Roadmap System
branches.role: Decision framework and execution system for the entire initiative
branches.ultimate_goal: Maintain a living, operational roadmap system that guides decisions, tracks progress, prevents sprawl, and communicates vision to stakeholders.
branches.current_state: Framework established. Blocker structure defined. Deep context decision sources created. Anti-sprawl controls incomplete. Database migration planned. Work dashboard in development.
branches.critical_blocker: Roadmap context must stay operational - need to balance detail with actionability

timeline.description: Complete roadmap navigation system, implement anti-sprawl controls, build execution dashboard

blockers: Roadmap framework needs anti-sprawl controls
Sensitive export data must not be committed raw
Command center can become too dense without detail/review separation
Missing Claude handoff documentation files
Roadmap time-layer needs concrete near-term milestones

work_items.task: Build work execution dashboard with this-week focus
work_items.why: Create actionable interface for tracking and completing work

work_items.task: Implement anti-sprawl controls and scope gates
work_items.why: Prevent roadmap from becoming unmanageable
Translate vision into actionable quarterly targets
Keep dashboard focused without losing decision context
Enable investor pitches, market research, and project planning documents

flow: 1. Deadhang Labor LLC secures contracts and generates revenue
2. Production Atlas discovers and surfaces job opportunities
3. The Crew Blueprint trains stagehands in required skills
4. Contractor Tools manage scheduling, communication, and payments
5. Contractors complete gigs through Deadhang deployment
6. Skills & Certifications validate expertise and market readiness
7. Repeat: System learns from gigs, improves training, expands opportunities
